summary: Iteration 35: Professional role, Audit Log tab, Student Sessions tab, Assigned Staff dropdown. Found and fixed critical Audit Log crash. All 9 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: logs.slice is not a function — API returns {total, page, per_page, entries} but component was doing setLogs(r.data || []) instead of setLogs(r.data.entries || []). Fixed to handle both array and object response.
ui_bugs.priority: CRITICAL - was crashing with runtime error

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py line 247: PUT /auth/role endpoint still has old valid roles list (missing 'professional') — but this old endpoint is NOT used by the frontend (frontend uses PUT /users/{user_id}/role which correctly includes professional). Low risk but worth fixing.
AuditLogTab was crashing — FIXED in this iteration. Frontend now correctly extracts r.data.entries from the paginated API response.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_professional and TEST_teacher_to_prof users via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features working: Professional role (violet badge) in Add User modal and edit dropdown, gear icon only on professional rows, Audit Log tab now working (was crashing - fixed r.data.entries), Student Sessions tab shows empty state correctly, Interventions New Intervention shows Assigned Staff dropdown when professionals exist (4 professional users in DB). Backend: POST /api/users professional=200, GET /api/appointments/audit=200, GET /api/appointments/student/{id}=200, GET /api/users/professionals=200.

results.professional_role_add_user_modal: PASS - Professional option visible with violet color
results.professional_gear_icon_conditional: PASS - 4 gear icons visible only on professional rows
results.role_permissions_professional_column: PASS - 5 configurable roles including Professional column
results.professional_appointments_students_defau: PASS - Professional has Appointments and Students checked in Page Access
results.audit_log_tab: PASS (after fix) - shows 2 entries from prior test run
results.student_sessions_tab: PASS - empty state message correctly shown
results.interventions_assigned_staff_dropdown: PASS - Select Assigned Staff dropdown shown (professionals exist)
